creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of articles/checkpoint has become outdated due to changes in the original document.

Fix: 

There are patches in http://chaos.ukrhub.net/FDP/doc.ru.articles.checkpoint.diff.tbz that may correct the problem.
How-To-Repeat:   Compare the revision of
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/checkpoint/
  and 'Original revision' in
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/checkpoint/Makefile?rev=1.1;content-type=text%2Fplain
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/checkpoint/article.sgml?rev=1.5;content-type=text%2Fplain
